Required Fields: Object ID; Name; Object Type; Owner; Status; Related Capability; Related Application; Related Standard; Related Requirement
Notes: Used to seed governed architecture objects and relationships.

Required Fields: Application ID; Name; Owner; Lifecycle State; Business Capability; Technology Domain; Criticality; Data Classification
Notes: Aligns applications to policy requirements and lifecycle states.

Required Fields: Capability ID; Capability Name; Owner; Domain; Parent Capability; Criticality
Notes: Used for capability-to-application and capability-to-service mapping.

Required Fields: Service ID; Service Name; Service Owner; Business Capability; Criticality; Operational Status
Notes: Supports service-based risk and resilience mapping.

Required Fields: Technical Service ID; Name; Owner; Supporting Platform; Business Service; Operational Status
Notes: Maps platform and infrastructure services to business services.

Required Fields: CI ID; Name; Class; Owner; Environment; Lifecycle State; Business Service; Technical Service
Notes: CMDB must support architecture intent but operations executes CI maintenance.

Required Fields: Control ID; Name; Objective; Owner; Requirement ID; Frequency; Evidence Source; Status
Notes: Alternative or synchronized control object if ServiceNow IRM is used with Archer.

Required Fields: Issue ID; Title; Source; Owner; Related Control; Severity; Due Date; Remediation Plan
Notes: Used when control failures or architecture exceptions require remediation tracking.

Required Fields: Exception ID; Type; Standard; Requirement ID; Control ID; Risk Rating; Expiration; Approver; Compensating Control
Notes: Exceptions must be time-bound and approved through ARB or delegated governance.
